facultyAuth.learnerPrompt: Looking for the learner sign in?

facultyDashboard.intro: Your starting point for course support, learning technology, and the resources our team offers to UDST faculty.

courses.title: Your courses
courses.body: Course management tools will appear here as we connect them to your faculty profile.

support.title: Learner support resources
support.body: Quick links to guides, templates, and support contacts that help your students succeed online.

production.title: Course production
production.body: Get in touch with the eUDST team to scope, design, and launch new digital learning experiences.

hero.body: eUDST is the gateway to online learning at the University of Doha for Science and Technology (UDST), offering flexible access to courses, programmes, and certifications that build skills and advance careers.

audiences.title: Skills that move careers forward, built around how you actually learn.
audiences.cardTitle: Applied, immersive online learning from UDST.
audiences.cardBody: Explore online academic and professional learning from the University of Doha for Science & Technology. Discover flexible courses, build in-demand skills, and take the next step with learning designed around real goals.

courses.title: Online, applied & professional courses for every learner.

howItWorks.title: Asynchronous online learning, built around you.
howItWorks.intro: The eUDST online catalogue offers micro-credentials and not-for-credit professional courses designed for focused, skill-based learning aligned with academic and industry standards. Whether you are building credentials for career growth or developing new skills for your own learning journey, you get hands-on, applied learning online, at your pace.

approach.title: Applied learning, designed with UDST faculty.
approach.body: eUDST is the gateway to online learning at the University of Doha for Science & Technology. Our courses are accessible, engaging and flexible, with for-credit options that may count towards an approved UDST programme (subject to academic regulations and adviser approval) and non-credit options for professional development or personal enrichment. Every course is shaped by experienced faculty alongside online learning and immersive technology specialists, and delivered in flexible formats so you can join in person, live online, or fully at your own pace.

immersive.title: Experience learning like never before.
immersive.body: eUDST brings immersive learning experiences into your courses to deepen applied, experiential learning that meets academic and industry standards. Engage with realistic simulations, immersive interactivity and technology-enhanced practice, supported by faculty and industry partners, so you build the skills, critical thinking and professional readiness that real careers demand.

howItWorks.stepsHeading: Your next course starts in four simple steps.

steps.title: Discover
steps.body: Browse courses and micro-credentials across UDST's focus areas and find the option that matches your goals, interests, and schedule.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.body: Sign up in minutes so you can save your place, continue your application, and return whenever you're ready.

steps.title: Enrol
steps.body: Choose your course and complete the enrolment process through a streamlined experience designed to get you started quickly.

steps.title: Start learning
steps.body: Access your online course space, track your progress, and begin building practical knowledge and skills that support your next step.

outcomes: A straightforward journey for new learners and returning professionals.
Less friction between discovering a course and getting started.
A more confident first step into UDST's online learning experience.

items.a: Anyone. You don't need to be a UDST student. External learners and professionals can register for online academic and professional courses, and micro-credentials.

items.q: How do I access my course after enrolling?
items.a: Once you complete payment, your course is unlocked from your eUDST dashboard. Launch any time from the same place, with no extra logins or setup.

items.q: What types of learning are available?
items.a: eUDST offers fully online, blended, and applied / immersive courses, plus stackable micro-credentials designed around real-world skills and outcomes.
A micro-credential is a short, focused credential that proves a specific skill. They're designed to be stackable, so you can combine several to build towards a larger qualification.

cta.title: Start your applied learning journey today.
cta.body: Discover immersive online courses and micro-credentials from UDST, built for skills that matter.

footer.tagline: eUDST is the University of Doha for Science & Technology eLearning Hub, offering applied, immersive online learning that builds skills and careers.
footer.rights: © {{year}} University of Doha for Science & Technology. All rights reserved.

catalogue.title: Explore our applied online learning courses & micro-credentials.
catalogue.body: Browse academic courses, professional learning and stackable micro-credentials from the University of Doha for Science & Technology, designed for real-world outcomes.

demoBanner.label: Demo preview:
demoBanner.body: every course is enrollable end-to-end. Course details and pricing shown are placeholders pending finalisation.

empty.title: No courses match these filters yet.
empty.body: Try a different combination, or request a custom course below.

faculty.metaDescription: Support for UDST faculty to design stronger digital learning experiences through eUDST.
faculty.body: eUDST partners with UDST faculty to design, develop, and deliver stronger online courses. Sign in to access the support, guidance, and resources that help you bring your teaching to life online.
faculty.supportTitle: Practical ed-tech support for course delivery and course innovation.
faculty.supportIntro: Our team helps faculty adopt technology in ways that improve course quality, student engagement, and instructional effectiveness.

supportCards.title: Learning platform support
supportCards.body: We help faculty structure course spaces, organise learning materials, and improve the online learner experience through better setup, content flow, and delivery planning.

supportCards.title: AR / VR exploration
supportCards.body: We support the use of augmented and virtual reality in teaching where immersive experiences can make learning more dynamic, practical, and memorable.

supportCards.title: AI tools for teaching
supportCards.body: We help faculty explore AI-powered tools for instructional design, assessment support, and more adaptive learning experiences that better meet student needs.

supportCards.title: Other educational technologies
supportCards.body: From collaboration tools to multimedia and assessment platforms, we work with faculty on a case-by-case basis to evaluate and integrate the right solutions.

faculty.workflowTitle: A clearer path from course idea to launch.
faculty.workflowBody: Bring your concept to one team and move through scoping, design support, and implementation with a more coordinated experience.

workflowSteps.title: Identify the opportunity
workflowSteps.body: Share your teaching goals, target learners, and the type of experience you want to improve or build.

workflowSteps.title: Shape the digital experience
workflowSteps.body: Work with our team on structure, tools, learning activities, and support resources aligned to your course outcomes.

workflowSteps.title: Launch with confidence
workflowSteps.body: Move into delivery with clearer workflows, stronger learner experience design, and the right technology in place.

faculty.ctaTitle: Ready to strengthen your next course?
faculty.ctaBody: Work with eUDST to shape more engaging, technology-enabled learning experiences for your students.

aboutUdst.metaDescription: Learn about the University of Doha for Science and Technology, its mission, vision and values.
aboutUdst.title: University of Doha for Science and Technology
aboutUdst.intro: University of Doha for Science and Technology was officially established by Emiri Decision No. 13 of 2022 as the first national university in the State of Qatar specialising in applied, technical, and professional education. UDST offers over 70 bachelor’s, master’s, and diploma programmes and is known for student-centred learning, modern facilities, and industry-relevant outcomes.

stats.programs: Bachelor’s, master’s and diploma programmes across applied and professional disciplines.
stats.colleges: Colleges, alongside specialised training centres for individuals and companies.
stats.legacy: A legacy of preparing highly skilled graduates who serve Qatar’s workforce and national development goals.

aboutUdst.visionBody: UDST shall be a leading institution that promotes excellence in applied education and research, contributing to innovation and sustainable development in the State of Qatar and the global community.
aboutUdst.missionBody: UDST advances quality applied science and technology through agile applied higher education and research for the socio-economic development of the State of Qatar and the world.

values.name: Accountability
values.body: UDST believes in being responsible and answerable for the outcomes of every activity, with a focus on measurable impact for students and stakeholders.

values.name: Adaptability
values.body: UDST responds to changing economic, social, and global conditions by empowering graduates through applied learning and responding to evolving workforce needs.

values.name: Innovation
values.body: UDST embraces new approaches to teaching, learning, and applied research to solve real-world problems locally and internationally.

values.name: Integrity
values.body: UDST is committed to sound governance, transparency, and upholding the values of higher education in all its work.

values.name: Quality
values.body: UDST maintains high standards in educational effectiveness, student success, and continuous improvement through evidence-based practice.

values.name: Sustainability
values.body: UDST is committed to environmentally sound development and to practices that support present and future generations.

aboutUdst.legacyBody: UDST takes pride in producing generations of highly skilled professionals who build remarkable careers, contribute to Qatar National Vision 2030, and support human, social, and economic development nationally and internationally.
